summary: Test suite covers core functionality (main branch, PRs, semver tags, feature branches, sanitization) via parametrized fixtures and validates workflow structure. However, critical gaps undermine confidence: (1) pytest tests in test_tag_generator.py appear disconnected from the act integration harness—unclear if they run through CI as required; (2) zero error/exception testing despite implementation having error paths (missing --branch/--sha arguments); (3) only 5 of 8+ fixture test cases run through act integration; (4) limited edge case coverage (branch names becoming empty after sanitization, SHAs < 7 chars, multiple semver tags, refs/pull extraction); (5) weak assertions in places ('in tags' vs exact order); (6) no pytest fixtures or conftest.py for shared infrastructure. Would not catch regressions in error handling or boundary conditions. Workflow file not provided for evaluation.
